26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Ubersnaps made this beaded container. Love it. Check more of their work in their posts.
27 Man Tax: Heath Ledger
“I can not do everything, but I can do something. I must not fail to do the something that I can do.” - Helen Keller So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Shots Fired!
item.description: EDIT: Wow, that was a fast frontpage. Thanks a lot Imgurians! I do reviews as a hobby, this week I reviewed "Breakfast of Champions" by Kurt Vonnegut! And this time I had the guest appearance of Mr. Sunday! And a bit of a guest appearance by Miss Jellybean. You can watch the review here https://youtu.be/2B1Dwr29JXc

item.title: On this day in 2003, American activist Rachel Corrie was brutally murdered by Israelis while trying to defend a Palestinian home from demolition. They killed her by driving a bulldozer over her and the home she was defending
item.description: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rachel_Corrie "Still wearing her fluorescent jacket, she sat down at least 15 meters in front of the bulldozer, and began waving her arms and shouting, just as activists had successfully done dozens of times that day. The bulldozer continued driving forward headed straight for Rachel. When it got so close that it was moving the earth beneath her, she climbed onto the pile of rubble being pushed by the bulldozer. She got so high onto it that she was at eye-level with the cab of the bulldozer. Her head and upper torso were above the bulldozer’s blade, and the bulldozer driver and co-operator could clearly see her. Despite this, he continued forward, which pulled her legs into the pile of rubble, and pulled her down out of view of the driver. If he'd stopped at this point, he may have only broken her legs, but he continued forward, which pulled her underneath the bulldozer. We ran towards him, and waved our arms and shouted, one activist with a megaphone. But the bulldozer driver continued forward, until Rachel was underneath the cab of the bulldozer." -Joe Carr, fellow activist You don't hate Israel enough.
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Christian Bale's $22M foster care village just outside LA in Palmdale is almost complete. With 11 residential buildings already up and completion expected later this year.
item.description: The project, developed by Bale’s nonprofit Together California alongside Dr. Eric Esrailian, is designed to keep siblings in foster care from being separated, pairing them with full-time, professionally trained foster parents in a purpose-built community. The village will also include a 7,000-square-foot community center, enrichment programs and green space, temporary housing for birth parents and transitional apartments for teens aging out of care. LA County has more children in foster care than anywhere in the U.S. Bale says this is the work he’ll be most proud of when he looks back on his life.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Second funniest monolog joke of the 2026 Oscars
item.description: The funniest joke was " not since 2012 there are no British actors up for best actor or actress. A British spokesperson said, " that's okay, at least we arrest our pedophiles. " "

i dont see whats childish about it.
All Of The Mattress People Are Needed.
Speed is relative...
My Steven Hawking People Need Me...
Never in a million years would I have guessed how this was going to play out.
Do not feed the monkeys !
Doordashed flowers to a funeral.
Elephants.
Emotional damage.
Everything reminds me of her.
Giant Penis shaped iceberg near Dildo, Canada.
Interesting.
I thought you’d only see this in cartoons.
I was an Atheist until I saw this.
Looks pretty cool honestly.
Lowkey mad at 10-year-old me for never figuring this out.
People say act normal in public, but us:
Read it twice, just to be 100% sure...
This guy operates the subway.
We must go, our vibrator people need us.
To my gym bros.
What the hell is this ?
What sport is this ? Look at these athletes !

item.title: PTGDump: Video Game Memes (Some Spicy!) Some More
item.description:
Hello everyone! Have a nice frosted Daisy for RHM. I know they gave her brown/auburn hair again, but she's always a redhead in my heart.
This method is very high-risk, high-reward.
I dunno. I've had some pretty out there "here me outs" over the years.
They should just make "The Legend of Zelda: Femboy Hyrule" and get it over with.
My goodness gracious!
In a Prius, no less.
I guess just pretend it's Wednesday today.
I like this attitude.
Cross-post from my Fitness Meme folder. (Wise fwom your gwave)
*Lifts pants8 *Unceasing horrors flow out*
Depends on the combat, really.
Who's up splatting their King Hippo?
Actually, don't do this. This is gross.
... unlimited cheese, you say?
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
Why hello again, Subnautica!
I know there's a lot of love for short-stack Midna. But I'm definitely a Real Midna kind of fella.
Edit: Flip Witch: Forbidden Sex Hex was fun. But if there's actually a game called Pussy Dungeon, then sign me up immediately.
Just another day at the office.
Add to this: mobile game ads where people are reading a script over the pre-recorded footage and pretending like they're playing.
FP Edit: Appreciate your eyeballs, y'all. Who are some of your "Hear Me Outs"? Thanks for reading everyone! Swing by my games channel to give me a piece of your mind. www.youtube.com@PTGDad Got a channel of your own? Give me a holler and I'll feature you in an upcoming dump! My channel is growing, and I want to take as many content creators along with me as I can. Rising tides raise all ships, and all.
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.description: When Trump said he was going to drain the swamp, I thought he meant corrupt politicians, not Netanyahu's balls.
item.dc:creator: kendottack

item.title: La Plata, Argentina, a city famous for its rationalist design featuring a perfect grid crisscrossed by diagonal avenues. The urban design includes numerous green spaces and plazas located exactly every six blocks, keeping everything within reach.
item.description: La Plata is famous for its exceptionally rational and symmetrical urban layout, which has earned it the nickname "City of Diagonals." Founded in 1882 and designed by engineer Pedro Benoit, it was Argentina’s first planned city, conceived to serve as the capital of the province of Buenos Aires. Its layout is based on a perfect square with an orthogonal grid interrupted by diagonal avenues that serve as strategic shortcuts to efficiently connect different parts of the city. Key design features: Grid and Diagonals: The design consists of a grid of numbered streets with wide diagonal avenues that cut across the blocks, reducing travel times and facilitating traffic flow. Green Spaces Every Six Blocks: The plan included the placement of a plaza or park every six blocks in any direction, ensuring that all residents have nearby access to recreational areas and "green lungs." Central Civic Axis: At the heart of the city lies Plaza Moreno, the geographic center where the main diagonals converge. It is surrounded by architectural landmarks such as the Neo-Gothic Cathedral and the Municipal Palace. International Recognition: Due to its modernity and functionality for the time, the city received two gold medals at the 1889 Paris World’s Fair as the “City of the Future” and for “Best Work Completed.” This layout is not only aesthetically impressive from an aerial view but was also designed according to 19th-century hygienist ideals to promote ventilation and natural lighting throughout the urban environment. Stolen from Mint_Perspective on Reddit. More info added by me.
item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: AIPAC Is Terrified Of Kat Abughazaleh
item.description: AIPAC Is Terrified Of Kat Abughazaleh https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HdTAKCwNHbg I am NOT associated with Kat Abughazaleh or her campaign in any way. I am NOT being paid anything monetarily tangible or intangible for this post (or any posts I've made in my history on imgur.) I have found out AIPAC directly and/or "hidden" AIPAC money offers $1500 for negative posts on Kat Abughazaleh. I've seen a few and I've replied to those users' negative Kat posts asking if they are being paid and NOT ONE has answered, hummmm! Anyone with time to knock on doors or phone bank the last two days? Kat Campaign - https://katforillinois.com/ AIPAC Funded Smear/Lie ADs attacking Kat (look at this filth AIPAC is funding! Nothing positive to say about the SHILL AIPAC if funding but only hate/smears/lies about Kat. https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2719170288?t=00h12m25s (Kat) Dem Politician ASSAULTED By ICE TELLS ALL To Krystal & Kyle! (with Kat Abughazaleh) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=htWGFlssNlg The United States of AIPAC Bought and Paid — The Israel Lobby in America https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o0d2HqHcaVU&t=216s Trump Wrongly Indicted Me, I’ll Rightly Impeach Him | Kat Abughazaleh Speaks at Lincoln Memorial https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jo54380qVGM Listen to Kat explain how a billionaire concealed their identity "officially/legally" identifying themselves as a "Farmer" donating to Kat. Then AIPAC funded ADs are smearing Kat on it. The FBI should immediately investigate if this person was ordered/purposely/falsely donated to Kat to create this incident days before election! It's purposeful fraud if donor and AIPAC conspired to make the attack with days left before voting! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KgX3UyEE3KM

item.title: Beware of vividbasket scams
item.description: This person does this multiple times each week. They make a post with an account involving some toy or gadget. Then they use another alt asking where they can find it. Then they use another alt to post a link to a scam website. It's always vividbasket. Then they use more accounts to praise the link poster. Notice how in these 2 posts by supposedly different people, its the same title, same comment providing the link, and same comments praising the link poster but all different accounts. Fuck these vividbasket scammers. Don't fall for them. Don't encourage these morons.
item.dc:creator: IGotMyDreamJobProgrammingGames

item.title: Dumpty trumpty
item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54

item.title: I’m finally ready to share this.
item.description:
On February 11th @ approximately 8:30 AM my partner Krystina Marie Pine suffered a massive heart attack and passed away. This is me, my mom, and brother at her memorial show last Sunday.
I’m the proud mom or the big boy on the left. Arwen was adopted by her @kittenzbratz21
This was a tribute show done for her a week ago Friday. She was supposed to perform in the show
Arwen seems to love sinks just like Oscar
He just fills them a bit more
This is her keepsake Urn. It now sits above my bed so she is always watching over me in some small way
Arwen does not understand personal space
Oscar has been sleeping on Krystina’s desk pretty often. I haven’t touched a single thing on it. I swear I’m going to look over there and see her one day
The first night we got Arwen, already sleeping on Mom
Once again, zero personal space
Love at first purr. I miss you more than I can say Krystina. You are the love of my life and I knew you for far too short of time. @KittensForDays Thank you for all your support, and the amazing orange reminder of my beloved. She really is the sweetest kitty. Just like her.
item.dc:creator: Justasleepykitty

item.title: Back from whence they came! Part 1
item.dc:creator: theoxfordcomma

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1641 (Martian jazz)
item.description:
Beginning to see a lot more negative comments lately. Someone actually told me to go kill myself last week. Come kill me yourself, coward. Anyway. Bread or whatever. Don't really care anymore.
Frankly, I'd absolutely love to die. Im tired of existing and waiting for the future climate change disaster the boomers have consigned me and my friends to die in, and would like to die beforehand. Either by murder or in my sleep. But I don't feel terribly motivated to do it myself.
Fuck figs. Wasp created bullshit fruit who's flavor is too subtle to show up in a goddamn mead.
No no, Mulder is basically right.
Someone also bitched at me for posting anti Orange One memes but no memes about the Iran war or from the POV of the Iranian people. 1. My dude, if I had some, I would. 2. I sadly cannot read Farsi, and on top of that, my understanding is that the internet has been out within Iran until yesterday anyway. 3. I age all my memes in barrel at LEAST two weeks before I post them, to see if they hold up, with small exceptions. 4. I believe virtue signaling is pointless if and when actual things are able to be done, and i try to do those actual things instead. 5. It's. ? A. ? Fucking. ? Meme. ? Dump. ?
There are honestly times it does feel like I do this while leading tours.
This guy was mentioned in an episode of the British History Podcast!
Im sure someone will say it's AI though.
Pippin is, like, secretary of Bite Club, at a minimum.
Internet Orthobros make me ashamed of my faith. Not of my belief in Christ, but of my co-religionists who are being absolute pricks.
Posted this one before, but fuck it. It's almost as good a reason as it would be if One of the Two Powerful Idiots dies. I had hopes for yesterday that were naturally dashed. Nobody celebrates the Ides of March properly anymore.
Fuck Objectivism
These birds are called Terns.
Mood. I am now okay with never having kids. And since it is highly unlikely that I will be stable enough for relationships ever again anyway... it doesn't matter.
I wonder if there's an equivalent word for "haphazard and completely batshit plans at the last minute" because boy howdy is that the current political shitshow.
If I could enjoy it. My car is throwing a knock engine sensor that is keeping it from accelerating properly so I'm going up to get it checked today and I am terrified at how much this shit will cost me when I almost am back on my feet.
I am trying. This is why I'm going to said car dealership for the appointment in wizard robes and with Pippin.
Pippin tax (and Baja cameo) Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning Pippin. I'm sorry Pippin. [Conure gibberish]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

2. YAP
3. This is wild, sound ON
4. So did we, are we the aliens?
5
6. "We're far enough, don't worry about it"
7. Laugh at your own peril
8

10. This might mess your eyes

12
13
14. Who else does this?
15. Thank you if you made it to the end of the dump! You can skip the last post, but if you are still here I just wanted to share that I'm making an indie psychological thriller/moral choice simulator game called The Milgram Experiment! You can check it on Steam and if you like my dump and want to encourage me to finish it, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment

item.title: GovBrief Today #409
item.description: The president and his FCC chair spent the weekend at Mar-a-Lago scheming to punish news networks for accurately covering a war that's going badly. Political strategist Will Robinson mapped America's attention deserts and what they mean for this year's midterms. Local news coverage has collapsed across the districts that will decide control of the House. Robinson calls these communities attention deserts, places where disinformation filled the vacuum when local papers and radio newsrooms went dark. Fifty million Americans now live with little or no local reporting at all. In those places, the national outlets Trump is threatening are the only news sources still reaching voters before November. Call your representatives and demand they protect the free press from a president who wants to control what Americans see and hear about his war. Their silence is his permission to finish the job. We've emailed 6,600+ stories over 409 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Robinson's Analysis: https://go.govbrief.today/attention-deserts [1] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-deal [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-hormuz-summit [3] https://go.govbrief.today/mi-attack-brother [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-backs-carr [5] https://go.govbrief.today/afghan-ice-death [6] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-columns [7] https://go.govbrief.today/no-kings-countdown Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Let’s play “Find the Taters!!”
item.description:
@missourigal sent me this video today of Sweet Potato Casserole being a little sneaky kitty! (Edit: not sure why the video is echoing, I’ll try to make sure future videos don’t!)
The bestest hider in all the land!
She looooves big sister Rosie
Look how long and fluffy she is! And how orange her ears have gotten!
The perfect little baby
